summary: Personal portfolio website for Debraj Paul, a student web developer from Assam, India. Dark blue and white theme, high-converting design targeting local businesses (lawyers, gyms, coaching centers, clinics). 7 sections: Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Why Choose Me, and Contact. Primary goal is generating client inquiries via WhatsApp (+918730818101) and Call. Pricing in INR (₹2,500 / ₹3,500 / ₹5,000). Includes sticky WhatsApp button, urgency messaging, and contact form.
architectural_notes: Dark blue and white color theme throughout
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern gym website browser mockup screenshot with dark background, bold typography, and energetic orange accents (portfolio-gym.dim_600x400.png)
- Professional lawyer/legal services website browser mockup screenshot with dark navy and gold accents, formal serif typography (portfolio-lawyer.dim_600x400.png)
- Bright coaching center website browser mockup screenshot with motivational headline, blue and white palette, student imagery (portfolio-coaching.dim_600x400.png)
- Friendly professional young male developer avatar illustration with dark blue background, suitable as a profile photo placeholder (avatar-debraj.dim_400x400.png)

existing_features.title: Build a full single-page personal portfolio website for Debraj Paul with a dark blue (#0A1628 / #0D2149) and white color scheme, clean modern typography, fully mobile-responsive layout, and a professional, confident, trustworthy tone throughout.
Implement a sticky top navigation bar with Debraj Paul's name/logo on the left and anchor links to all 7 sections on the right. On mobile, collapse navigation into a hamburger menu.

Create the Hero section with: headline 'Professional Business Websites in 48 Hours', subheadline 'I help local businesses get more clients with modern, mobile-optimized websites.', two CTA buttons ('Get Free Demo' linking to Contact section and 'Chat on WhatsApp' opening https://wa.me/918730818101), and an urgency line 'Limited Projects Taken Each Month' styled with a badge or highlight.

Create the About Me section with the bio: 'I'm Debraj Paul, a student web developer based in Assam. I help lawyers, gyms, coaching centers and small businesses build affordable, professional websites that generate real client inquiries.' Include a profile photo placeholder and a 'Request Free Demo' CTA button that scrolls to the Contact section.

Create the Services section displaying 5 icon cards: 'Business Website Design', 'Landing Pages', 'Website Redesign', 'WhatsApp & Call Integration', and 'Basic SEO Setup'. Each card should have a relevant icon, title, and a short one-line description.

Create the Portfolio section with 3 sample project cards: 'Sample Gym Website', 'Sample Lawyer Website', and 'Sample Coaching Website'. Each card should show a placeholder thumbnail image, project title, and a short description. Include a note: 'Demo designs available on request.'

Create the Pricing section with 3 tiers: Basic (₹2,500), Standard (₹3,500, labeled 'Most Popular'), and Premium (₹5,000). Each card should list relevant features appropriate to the tier. The Standard card should be visually highlighted as the recommended option. Each card should have a CTA button that links to the Contact/WhatsApp.

Create the 'Why Choose Me' section displaying 5 benefit points: '48 Hour Delivery', 'Affordable Student Pricing', 'Modern Clean Design', 'Direct WhatsApp Support', and 'No Hidden Charges'. Use icons or checkmarks alongside each point.

Create the Contact section with a form containing fields: Name, Phone, Business Type, and Message, plus a submit button. Below the form, display contact details: Call: +918730818101, WhatsApp: +918730818101 (linking to https://wa.me/918730818101), Email: belipaul4567@gmail.com, Location: Assam, India. The form submission should be stored in the backend.

Add a sticky floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom-right corner of every page section. Clicking it opens https://wa.me/918730818101 in a new tab. The button should use the WhatsApp green color and a WhatsApp icon, with a subtle pulse or tooltip 'Chat with me'.
Add a footer with copyright text '© 2024 Debraj Paul. All rights reserved.' and quick links to all sections.

Generate portfolio thumbnail images for the 3 sample projects — a gym website preview, a lawyer website preview, and a coaching center website preview — and a professional avatar/profile photo placeholder for the About section. Render all generated images from frontend/public/assets/generated.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero section with headline, subheadline, CTA buttons, and urgency line
About Me section with bio and Free Demo CTA
Portfolio section with 3 sample demo projects
Pricing section with 3 tiers in INR
Why Choose Me section with 5 bullet points
Contact section with form and contact details
Sticky WhatsApp button across the site

Implement a backend Motoko actor to store contact form submissions with fields: name, phone, businessType, message, and timestamp. Expose a public method to add a new inquiry and an admin query method to retrieve all inquiries.
